goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision, then open exactly one next low-friction branch only if A1 fails promotion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing counts as improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
Only one candidate branch open at a time; no parallel wide search
Medium-friction wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed with no promoted candidate

slices.title: Контроль запрета на medium-friction wave
slices.hypothesis: Enforce the hard gate: wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch is fully closed with no promoted candidate.
slices.objective: Enforce the hard gate: wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch is fully closed with no promoted candidate.
success_criteria: Control table is filled: A1 closed, selected low-friction branch closed, wave B NOT opened prematurely
evidence_requirements: Control table is filled: A1 closed, selected low-friction branch closed, wave B NOT opened prematurely

slices.title: Финальный отчет агента
slices.hypothesis: Produce a structured final report answering all mandatory questions about v3 results, A1 outcome, next branch outcome, and v4 recommendations.
slices.objective: Produce a structured final report answering all mandatory questions about v3 results, A1 outcome, next branch outcome, and v4 recommendations.
success_criteria: Complete structured report covering all 7 mandatory sections exists
evidence_requirements: Complete structured report covering all 7 mandatory sections exists
